rc_fit.note: 1C temp resolution + small span (board runs cool) -> tau is approximate

perf_vs_temp.verdict: flat: |slope| within constant-temp noise -> no throttle in the achievable range

honesty: no power telemetry -> no absolute R_th(°C/W); single lumped max-core temp (5-sensor slog intermittent); cooldown not captured (collector idle); perf-vs-temp only over the achievable 41-44°C envelope, 110°C downscale threshold never reached; shared die (verified effectively single-user at capture, host_load logged).
